CASHBACK SBI CARD.milestone_benefits: Renewal fee waived on annual spends of Rs. 2 Lakhs
CASHBACK SBI CARD.earning_caps: Max 5000 INR per billing cycle for 5% category

SimplyCLICK SBI CARD.redemption_options: SBI Card Rewards Catalogue (e-vouchers, products) or statement balance credit

HDFC Millennia Credit Card.welcome_benefits: 1000 Reward Points on payment of Joining membership fee
HDFC Millennia Credit Card.milestone_benefits: ₹1000 worth gift vouchers on spends of ₹1,00,000 and above in each calendar quarter
HDFC Millennia Credit Card.special_tie_ups: Swiggy Dineout, Amazon, BookMyShow, Cult.fit, Flipkart, Myntra, Sony LIV, Swiggy, Tata CLiQ, Uber, Zomato
HDFC Millennia Credit Card.earning_caps: 1000 Reward Points on 5% cashback, 1000 Reward Points on 1% cashback
HDFC Millennia Credit Card.redemption_options: Minimum 500 Reward Points for redemption, 1 Reward Point = ₹1 for CashBack redemption, 1 Reward Point = ₹1 for travel benefits, 1 Reward Point = upto ₹0.30 for SmartBuy Rewards Portal, 50% of booking value for flights and hotels, 70% of product/voucher value for select vouchers/products, 3000 rewards points per calendar month for CashBack redemption, 50,000 rewards points per calendar month for flights and hotels redemption

HDFC Bank MoneyBack+ Credit Card.earning_caps: Max 2,500 CashPoints per month on 10X categories; Max 2,500 on 5X EMI

Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card.waiver_threshold: Lifetime Free (No annual fee to waive)
Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card.special_tie_ups: Amazon, Amazon Pay Partner Merchants (Swiggy, Uber, etc.)

ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card.reward_multiplier: 2 Reward Points per Rs 100 spent (1 Point per Rs 100 on utilities/insurance; 0 on fuel)
ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card.welcome_benefits: 500 Reward Points on payment of joining fee (if not issued as Lifetime Free)
ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card.earning_caps: No capping on base reward points accumulation
